message:
style(fusion): apply rustfmt to mmr.rs and searcher.rs

Reformat code in the fusion crate to conform to rustfmt standards:

- mmr.rs: Realign the min/max score fold expression to proper
  indentation depth. Collapse the if/else best-score selector onto a
  single line since both arms are trivial expressions.

- searcher.rs: Expand the inline if/else for index mapping
  (u32::MAX sentinel check) to a multi-line block for readability.
  Collapse cpu_pct_from_jiffies call and its function signature to
  fewer lines since the arguments fit comfortably.

No logic changes -- formatting only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
